title: Memory Service Silent Database Failures
essence: Session memory saving fails silently without user feedback or fallback behavior
symptoms: Session context not remembered between chats
repro_steps: End session and start new one
Ask persona about previous conversation topics
root_cause: Database errors in saveSessionMemory are caught and logged but not propagated, causing silent failures
do_not_do: Log errors but continue without user notification
guardrails: Implement retry logic for transient failures
Add user-facing notifications for memory failures

evidence.notes: Degrades user experience but not critical - memory is convenience feature
